finding_results.notes: Recast the packet-targeted clipped narration beats as complete sentences while preserving the same close-third pressure and scene function.
Reduced chapter-level 'old dog' repetition to the single earned age-versus-urgency line at 423; adjacent Bond beats now rely on behavior and naming instead of re-certifying his age.
Rephrased the telepathic-consent violation in theft/trespass terms rather than the repeated 'offered' frame, while also removing the stray process-leak phrasing on that sentence.

summary: All three prose/copyedit findings for chapter 14 were resolved: the clipped narration beats now read as complete sentences, Bond's 'old dog' wording appears only once in the chapter, and the telepathic violation language now varies away from the repeated 'offered' construction.
